note: The official rate card expresses Codex consumption in credits, not USD. Benchmark evidence therefore records codex_credits and does not invent a cash conversion. v2 adds GPT-5.6 Luna (rate card row 'GPT-5.6 Luna': 25 / 2.50 / 150 credits per 1M input / cached input / output tokens), captured from the live help-center page on 2026-07-10 after verifying gpt-5.6-luna availability on codex-cli 0.144.1. gpt-5.4 rates are unchanged from the v1 capture.
